episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein survivors tell their stories to House Democrats
episodes.description:
Jeffrey Epstein survivors testified at an unofficial field hearing in Florida, sharing stories of their abuse.

episodes.title: Former Harvard president Larry Summers resigning over ties to Jeffrey Epstein

Larry Summers will resign from his academic and faculty roles at Harvard University.
